raw_input:
Extract the flight information into a JSON object. Fields: airline (string, full name), flight_number (string, exactly as given e.g. 'LH441'), departure_airport (IATA 3-letter code), arrival_airport (IATA 3-letter code), departure_datetime (ISO 8601 local time with NO timezone suffix, e.g. '2026-06-04T13:45'), arrival_datetime (same format), same_day (boolean, true iff departure and arrival are on the same calendar date in the local zones).

Itinerary:
"Lufthansa flight LH441 departs Frankfurt (FRA) on 04 June 2026 at 13:45 local time, arriving Chicago O'Hare (ORD) at 16:20 local the same day."

Return only the JSON object.
